Product category

Custom Cupcake Liners & Paper Baking Cups Wholesale

Food-grade greaseproof cupcake liners and paper baking cups for bakeries, importers, distributors and supermarket private-label programs.

Request a Quote Get Free Sample

Materials and features

What buyers can confirm on this page

Material: Food grade cake paper and greaseproof paper.

  • Grease-proof
  • Heat-resistant
  • Easy release
  • Soy-ink printing
  • Custom colors and patterns

Applications

Common B2B use cases

  • Bakeries
  • Cupcake brands
  • Cafe chains
  • Party supply wholesalers
  • Retail baking kits

OEM / ODM

OEM design, sampling and export cartons

LANGMAI supports size selection, artwork checks, color matching, custom packaging and pre-production sample confirmation for overseas buyers.

  1. Confirm product and size
  2. Send artwork or select stock design
  3. Approve sample and packaging
  4. Start mass production and inspection

Please complete the required fields. Your inquiry will be sent securely to our sales inbox.

FAQ

Custom Cupcake Liners & Paper Baking Cups Wholesale FAQ

What material is used for Custom Cupcake Liners & Paper Baking Cups Wholesale?

Food grade cake paper and greaseproof paper. Buyers can review the visible material notes, specifications and packaging details before requesting samples.

Can LANGMAI make custom printed designs?

Yes. Custom colors, sizes, stock designs and OEM artwork are supported. Buyers should confirm artwork, material, carton quantity and sample approval before mass production.

Which certificates should buyers confirm?

The website shows BSCI, ISO, FSC, FDA, LFGB, EUDR and BRC certificate names or document previews. Final scope, validity and report numbers should be checked during order review.

How do I request a quote?

Send product type, size, quantity, target market, custom print needs, email and WhatsApp through the inquiry form.
